name: CallSense Voice Processing Agent
description: Voice middleware agent for CallSense. Accepts inbound audio stream payloads, transcribes via VALSEA real-time transcription, and forwards final transcripts to the CallSense Next.js backend for intent routing and response synthesis.

endpoints./process-audio: Internal routing endpoint for inbound audio stream payloads (chunked or base64); runs VALSEA RTT and forwards transcript.final to CallSense backend

skills.name: Process Inbound Audio Stream
skills.description: Receives streaming or batched audio payloads on /process-audio, transcribes with VALSEA regional speech-to-text, and POSTs final transcript to CallSense /api/calls/process
examples: Process this inbound call audio stream for business_id abc and caller +6591234567
Transcribe streamed PCM chunks and route to CallSense backend
